data.body: Update CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md: remove issue_tracker.create_cmd section (lines 296-304), update all Used-by fields that reference 'the tk script' to reference the actual v3 scripts (bridge-outbound.py, bridge-inbound.py, ticket sync), update tickets.prefix and tickets.directory sections Used-by fields, update environment variable sections (JIRA_URL, JIRA_USER, JIRA_API_TOKEN, JIRA_PROJECT, TK_SYNC_SKIP_WORKTREE_PUSH) Used-by fields. test-exempt: no conditional logic, pure documentation text edits, change-detector tests only. Regression verified by RED test bbfb-ce09.
